team.title: Team
team.description: Manage team members, send invitations, configure API keys, and set up webhooks for event notifications.

members.comingSoon: Team member management coming soon. You'll be able to add team members with different roles (Owner, Admin, Member, Viewer) and manage their permissions.
members.emptyDescription: Invite team members to collaborate on credential issuance and application review.

issuance.title: Issuance

templates.title: Credential Templates
templates.description: Configure and manage credential templates for issuance.

history.title: Issuance History
history.description: View all credentials issued by your organization, including status and revocation history.
history.comingSoon: Issuance history coming soon. You'll be able to view all issued credentials, filter by status, and review revocation history.

settings.title: Issuance Settings
settings.description: Configure global issuance policies, approval workflows, and notification preferences.
settings.comingSoon: Issuance settings coming soon. You'll be able to configure automatic approval rules, notification templates, and credential expiration policies.

verification.title: Verification
verification.description: Define presentation policies to verify credentials from applicants and external parties.
verification.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this policy?

empty.title: No Presentation Policies Yet
empty.description: Presentation policies define what credentials you want to verify from applicants. You can specify required fields, accepted issuers, and validation rules.

policyBuilder.title: Policy Builder
policyBuilder.description: Create presentation policies with a visual builder. Define required credentials, fields, and validation rules.

verificationHistory.title: Verification History
verificationHistory.description: View all verification requests, see which passed or failed, and audit the verification log.

trustedIssuers.title: Trusted Issuers
trustedIssuers.description: Manage a list of trusted credential issuers whose credentials you'll accept.

freeProcessing.description: Waive all processing fees for applicants

defaultFee.description: This fee is charged to all applicants unless per-credential fees are configured.

perCredentialFees.label: Per-Credential Fees
perCredentialFees.description: Set different fees for each credential type

info.title: Payment Processing
info.description: Processing fees are collected via Square at the time of application. Funds are deposited to your connected Square account minus Square's transaction fees (2.6% + $0.10).

consistencyRules.icao: ICAO PKD certificates required, DID methods must align with ICAO trust framework
consistencyRules.aamva: AAMVA jurisdiction-specific certificates required, DID methods must be AAMVA-approved
consistencyRules.eudi: EUDI Wallet trust anchors required, DID methods must be on EU trusted list
consistencyRules.enterprise: Custom organizational PKI, flexible DID method support

customProfiles.title: Custom Profiles

aamva.name: AAMVA
aamva.description: Use AAMVA standards for driver licenses and state IDs. Recommended for North America.

openBadges.description: Issue educational credentials, certifications, and skill badges. Supports X.509 certificates with W3C Verifiable Credentials.

custom.name: Custom X.509
custom.description: Manage your own certificate trust anchors for private PKI.

overview.notConfiguredYet: Trust profile not configured yet. Complete onboarding to set up trust framework.

certificates.description: View the status of your PKI trust chain including root CA, intermediate CA, and CRL.
